scripts.setup: npm run wrangler:init && npm run cf-typegen

TEAM_DOMAIN.description: Cloudflare Access team domain. Use the HTTPS team URL from Zero Trust, for example `https://your-team.cloudflareaccess.com`.

POLICY_AUD.description: Cloudflare Access AUD tag for the self-hosted application that protects `/admin`, `/admin.html`, `/api`, and `/api/*`.

APP_TIMEZONE.description: Application timezone used to interpret scheduling fields (`Ativa em`/`Expira em`) when values are submitted without explicit timezone offset. Default: `America/Sao_Paulo`.

API_KEY.description: Optional secret for internal API automation only. Store it as a secret, not as a public `vars` value.

IP_HASH_SECRET.description: Optional secret used to generate HMAC-SHA-256 IP hashes for privacy-preserving analytics. Generate a random value and keep it outside versioned files.

db_boltlink.description: D1 database used for links and click analytics. The deploy flow can provision it automatically from the Wrangler config.
